planner.rationale: Backfill branch and current branch are not tree-equivalent. Treat this as real content drift, not metadata-only debt.

cleanup_priority.reason: generated snapshots can usually be refreshed later
memory artifacts should be reviewed before branch movement
hand-authored docs can be grouped after generated outputs
script changes affect operator and CI behavior
tests should stay paired with code changes
core library changes are high-signal branch content
miscellaneous root-level changes need manual review

settlement_lanes.name: refreshable_artifacts
settlement_lanes.title: Refreshable Artifacts
settlement_lanes.goal: Separate reproducible outputs from authored source edits before any branch movement.
recommended_actions: Do not let generated status snapshots and derived reports drive branch-base decisions.
Refresh, discard, or restage reproducible artifacts only after the authored source set is stable.
settlement_lanes.exit_criteria: No remaining dirty paths in generated outputs or reports, or an explicit decision to preserve them.

settlement_lanes.name: private_memory_review
settlement_lanes.title: Private Memory Review
settlement_lanes.goal: Review private memory artifacts outside the public-branch settlement path.
recommended_actions: Treat raw memory artifacts as private-evolution evidence, not ordinary public repo edits.
Mirror only public-safe learnings into task/reflection/status artifacts when needed.
settlement_lanes.exit_criteria: Private memory changes are either archived to the private path or consciously excluded from branch movement.

settlement_lanes.name: public_contract_docs
settlement_lanes.title: Public Contract Docs
settlement_lanes.goal: Group public documentation and spec edits by owning implementation phase.
recommended_actions: Settle docs and specs after generated artifacts are separated, but before final branch movement.
Keep public docs aligned with the actual runtime and governance artifacts they describe.
settlement_lanes.exit_criteria: Docs/spec edits are paired with their implementation or intentionally deferred.

settlement_lanes.name: runtime_source_changes
settlement_lanes.title: Runtime Source Changes
settlement_lanes.goal: Review high-signal code and contract changes as cohesive change groups.
recommended_actions: Keep tests paired with the code paths they validate instead of settling them independently.
Treat scripts, runtime apps, and core `tonesoul` changes as the public source-of-truth lane.
settlement_lanes.exit_criteria: Core source edits are grouped into reviewable changesets with matching tests and docs.

settlement_lanes.name: experimental_misc_review
settlement_lanes.title: Experimental and Misc Review
settlement_lanes.goal: Resolve root-level drift and experimental assets deliberately instead of letting them hitchhike.
recommended_actions: Decide whether experimental files belong to the public repo, a follow-up branch, or should be dropped.
Review uncategorized root-level files manually before any git history movement.
settlement_lanes.exit_criteria: Experimental and miscellaneous paths have an explicit keep/defer/drop decision.
